title: Error saving workflow due to SQLite syntax error
symptom: When attempting to save a workflow, n8n throws an SQLITE_ERROR related to a syntax error near a hyphen. This prevents the workflow from being saved.
applies_when: Using n8n in a Docker environment
Encountering a saving issue with workflows
not_this_if: Error occurs in a non-Docker setup
No error message related to SQLite is shown
root_cause: The error is likely caused by a temporary glitch or a database lock within the SQLite database used by n8n. This can happen if the database connection is unstable or if there are concurrent access issues.
fix_steps: Wait for the container to fully restart
Attempt to save the workflow again
agent_instruction: Restart the n8n Docker container and try saving the workflow again.
